comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Bhutan episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE BHUTAN COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we curated for this episode → https://amzn.to/43yHjcV

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN BHUTAN*
  ◦ Bhutan tours, monastery treks, and Tiger's Nest hikes → https://shorturl.at/S2lqZ
  ◦ Browse all Bhutan experiences → https://shorturl.at/wkDKb

*📖 PLAN YOUR BHUTAN TRIP*
  ◦ Bradt Bhutan travel guide by Erin Levi → https://amzn.to/43kDIiN

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO BHUTAN*
  ◦ The History of Bhutan by Karma Phuntsho → https://amzn.to/4u5vlSN
  ◦ Treasures of the Thunder Dragon by Queen Mother Ashi Dorji Wangmo Wangchuck → https://amzn.to/4fMxYWd
  ◦ The Geography of Bliss by Eric Weiner → https://amzn.to/4dC6b9I

*🍲 BRING BHUTAN HOME*
  ◦ Taste Tibet cookbook by Julie Kleeman and Yeshi Jampa → https://amzn.to/4u3qh1v
  ◦ Bhutan photography by Robert Dompnier → https://amzn.to/4uD8fnW
